title: Indexing into parameters which are 1 bit in size fails
body:
---


Author Name: **Charlie Brej**
Original Redmine Issue: 632 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2013-03-12


---

The following program fails with "Illegal bit or array select; variable already selected, or bad dimension: PAR". Changing the size of the value PAR is assigned with makes it work again.

```
module a ();
  localparam PAR = 1'b0;
  wire signal = PAR[0];
endmodule

```

Thanks in advance.
